A MULTIDISCIPLINARY CREATIVE STUDIO

Visual Authority for
Ethiopia's Leading Brands.

We bridge the gap between world-class aesthetics and local market intelligence. ESET Creatives architects digital experiences that command attention and drive measurable growth.

Initiate Project

Our Services

Comprehensive solutions engineered for measurable growth and market dominance.

Strategic Narrative

We don't just post; we curate. We manage your presence through high-impact content designed to build unbreakable community trust.

  • Paid social campaigns (Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn)
  • Content strategy & community management
  • Influencer partnerships & UGC campaigns

Visual Architecture

From premium logos to full brand guidelines, we design the systems that make your brand recognizable at a glance.

  • Logo design & brand guidelines
  • Packaging & print collateral
  • Brand positioning & messaging

Performance UI/UX

High-speed, immersive web experiences built on modern tech stacks to ensure your digital storefront never lags.

  • Web platforms for High-Growth Brands
  • Custom web applications & landing pages
  • CRO audits & A/B testing

Editorial Assets

Professional-grade media production that captures the soul of your brand through studio-level cinematography.

  • Product photography & lifestyle shoots
  • Video ads & social media content
  • Brand films & testimonial videos

The Blueprint

A seamless 3-step lifecycle ensuring that every design decision natively translates into a measurable business outcome.

Step 01: Intelligence

Focus on audience modeling and competitive gap analysis.

Step 02: Execution

Focus on pixel-perfect artifacts and enterprise standards.

Step 03: Telemetry

Focus on real-world data, conversion rates, and iterative refinement.

Case Studies

Measurable disruption. Strategic execution mapped directly to lower CAC and higher ROAS.

The Leadership

Architects of disruption. Meet the minds pulling the strings behind the industry's highest performing assets.

Matiyas Zelalem

Creative Director

Architecting visual systems with a focus on luxury aesthetics. Matiyas blends high-end art direction with technical rigor.

Ephrathah Shimelis

Head of Strategy

The architect of brand voice. Ephrathah transforms strategic positioning into compelling narratives.

Hailegiorgis Nigussie

Head of Production

Leading on-set creative execution. Bridges the gap between raw vision and editorial-grade assets.

Samrawit Firew

Operations Director

Managing agency velocity. Oversees team coordination and lead milestones with absolute precision.

Ananiya Siyum

Head of Web & Systems

Engineering the digital backbone. Specializes in high-performance web architecture and workflow automation.

Mariyamawit Mengestie

Finance & Lead Ops

The guardian of fiscal health. Ensures operational transparency and financial professionalism.

1. The Manifesto

Architecting Brand Authority.

ESET Creatives is a multidisciplinary studio dedicated to elevating how brands exist in the digital age. We bridge the gap between world-class aesthetics and local market intelligence. From the first pixel to the final frame, we engineer every touchpoint to command attention and drive measurable growth.

2. Momentum & Proof

4-Core

Specialized divisions: Strategy, Branding, Web, and Media.

100%

Bespoke execution. No templates, no shortcuts.

End-to-End

Concept to deployment, managed under one roof.

ROI-First

Every creative decision is a calculated move for your business.

3. Our Four Pillars

I.

Brand Identity Development

We don’t just design logos; we build visual identities. We create the systems that make your brand recognizable, trusted, and authoritative at a glance.

II.

Website & System Development

We engineer high-speed, immersive digital storefronts. Using elite modern technology, we ensure your online presence is as smooth as it is beautiful.

III.

Photography & Videography

Professional photography and cinematography that captures the soul of your brand. We provide the editorial-grade assets required for a premium market position.

IV.

Social Media Marketing

Strategic narrative management for the digital era. We curate your presence across platforms to build community trust and scale your reach.

Let’s build what’s next.

Partner with a specialized collective dedicated to precision, craft, and measurable impact.

Brief us on your vision

A high-end creative studio architecting digital excellence. We fuse sophisticated visual identity with performance-driven strategy to build brands that command market authority.

  • Social Media Marketing
  • Brand Identity Development

  • Photography & Videography
